user.title: DJI Power (local BLE)
user.description: How do you want to provide the station's local pair key?

menu_options.account: Fetch it from my DJI account

manual.title: Enter pair key
manual.description: Enter the station's Bluetooth address and its 32-character local pair key.

token.title: Paste a DJI member token
token.description: Paste an existing DJI `x-member-token`. It is used once to fetch the local key and is not stored.

account.title: Sign in to DJI
account.description: Sign in to the DJI account this station is bound to. Your password is used once to fetch the local key and is not stored. You'll solve a DJI image captcha next.

captcha.title: Verify you're human
captcha.description:
Type the characters shown in the image (case-sensitive). A wrong or unreadable code just loads a new image.

![captcha]({image})

twofa.title: Verification code
twofa.description: DJI sent a verification code to your account. Enter it to finish signing in.

finish.title: Choose your station
finish.description: Your DJI account has more than one device. Pick the one for this integration.

error.invalid_pair_key: Pair key must be exactly 32 hexadecimal characters.
error.invalid_code: That verification code was not accepted. Try again.
error.invalid_token: That token was not accepted, or it has no devices with a pair key. Check the token and try again.
error.rate_limited: Too many verification attempts. Wait a while and try again.
error.login_failed: Sign-in failed. Check your email and password and try again.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the DJI cloud to fetch the pair key.
abort.no_devices: No DJI devices with a local pair key were found on this account.
